name: Succotash
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen whole kernel corn, partially thawed
10 oz frozen lima beans, partially thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp; remove the bacon, reserving 2 tablespoons of the drippings in the skillet. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
2. Add onion and sage to the drippings and cook, stirring constantly for 3-5 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain any excess fat from the skillet and return it to heat.
3. Add corn and beans to the skillet; cook, stirring constantly for 5-7 minutes or until tender. Stir in milk (half and half), sugar, cooked rice, and chopped ham.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the liquid is slightly reduced. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
5. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon and serve immediately.
